answer:
\boxed{Donald Trump}

The question refers to **Donald Trump**, who released his tax returns during his 2016 presidential campaign—though they were heavily redacted and only covered a limited period (2015–2017) due to legal disputes. His earlier claims of releasing 12 years of returns were later disputed, but the context aligns with his 2016 run. No other major U.S. presidential candidate has done so to this extent.
